AuditEvent.target: Rule: Validation DateConfig Rule For 15days Trigger

entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation DateConfig Rule For 15days Trigger Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String>sql:SELECT r.value,GROUP_CONCAT(b.name ORDER BY b.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS bundle_names FROM identityiq.spt_bundle b JOIN identityiq.spt_bundle_profile_relation r ON b.id = r.bundle_id WHERE r.value IN ('CN=AuditMgmt,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com') and r.source_application='ActiveDirectory' AND r.source_bundle_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY r.value</String>
